tiktok.caption: Your $400K home actually costs $958,000. The bank quietly collects $558K in interest and never mentions it 🏠💸

youtube_short.title: You're Paying $558K Interest on a $400K Home
title_alternatives: The Hidden $558K Cost Inside Every 30-Year Mortgage
The Mortgage Math Your Bank Hopes You Never Do
youtube_short.description: Your $400K home doesn't actually cost $400K — it costs $958,000. On a standard 30-year mortgage at 7%, you hand the bank $558,000 in interest alone. In your first decade, over 80% of every payment is pure interest, not equity. But one extra payment a year saves $85,000 and cuts four years off your mortgage. Follow for one money truth every day. #mortgage #personalfinance #homebuying #moneytips #realestate
